title: qVanilla+
description: A Vanilla compatible modpack with some QoL and optimization mods
body: --- A modpack strictly for vanilla. No gameplay changes, just optimizations, quality of life changes, and shaders support. --- ### Optimization qVanilla+ uses the modern optimization mods such as [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) and [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium). These mods are the modern alternatives for optifine and alongside other mods supports nearly all optifine mods such as shaders, connected textures, and zoom! --- ### QoL qVanilla+ also adds mods to enchance your experience while playing, especially on multiplayer servers. Such as [Bobby](https://modrinth.com/mod/bobby/) where you can have render distance greater than the servers and [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat) where you can talk to your friends. Along with many more! You can view the updated mod list by looking at the dependencies under the version in the [versions](https://modrinth.com/modpack/qvanilla+/version/latest) tab. --- **Want to request a mod to be added?** Message me in the quartzdev [discord](https://quartzdev.gg/discord) --- Supported modpack for the public [KSU Esports MC Server](https://mc.esports.kennesaw.edu/). All of these mods have been approved and can be used with or without using the full modpack. This modpack can be used by anyone on any server... However, it is your responsibility to find out if this modpack is accepted to be used on the server you're playing on. --- Pack logo made by [u/Dmitriy_DG3D](https://www.reddit.com/user/Dmitriy_DG3D/) with permission to be used for the modpack
